title: CAE Manufacturing - Machine Health Monitor
description: Real-time machine health monitoring with multivariate anomaly detection. Fabric teal (#0078D4) for normal, red (#E81123) for alert.

tiles.title: Machine Health Status
tiles.query:
MachineHealthAlerts()
| summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by machine_id
| project machine_id, rule, composite_score = round(composite_score, 2), alert
| order by composite_score desc
tiles.notes: Conditional formatting: alert=ALERT rows in #E81123 red, OK rows in #0078D4 teal

tiles.title: Active Alerts (Last 15 min)
tiles.query:
MachineHealthAlerts()
| where timestamp > ago(15m)
| project timestamp, machine_id, rule, Score=round(composite_score,2), description
| order by timestamp desc

tiles.title: Alerts Over Time
tiles.query:
MachineHealthAlerts()
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize alerts = count() by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| render timechart

tiles.title: Composite Health Scores - All Machines
tiles.query:
MachineHealthAlerts()
| summarize max_score = max(composite_score) by machine_id
| order by max_score desc
| render barchart
tiles.notes: Bar color: #0078D4 for score < 0.55, #FF8C00 for 0.55-0.65, #E81123 for > 0.65

tiles.title: Spindle Temperature
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('CNC-001','CNC-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Spindle Temperature'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart
tiles.notes: Line: #0078D4 teal when < normal_max, turns #E81123 red when > warning_max. Threshold lines: normal=#107C10 green dashed, warning=#FF8C00 orange dashed, critical=#E81123 red solid.

tiles.title: Spindle Vibration
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('CNC-001','CNC-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Spindle Vibration'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart

tiles.title: Coolant Flow Rate
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('CNC-001','CNC-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Coolant Flow Rate'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart
tiles.notes: Inverted thresholds - alert when BELOW threshold

tiles.title: Bearing Wear Composite Score
tiles.query:
CNC_BearingWearScore
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, composite_score, machine_id
| render timechart
tiles.notes: Area fill: #0078D4 teal below 0.65, #E81123 red above. Alert line: #E81123 dashed at 0.65.

tiles.title: Power Consumption
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('CNC-001','CNC-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Power Consumption'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart

tiles.title: Axis Position Accuracy
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'CNC-001'
| where sensor_name == 'Axis Position Accuracy'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value
| render timechart
tiles.notes: Band chart: green band for normal, orange for warning, red for critical

tiles.title: Nozzle Temperature
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'LSR-001'
| where sensor_name == 'Nozzle Temperature'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value
| render timechart

tiles.title: Beam Alignment
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'LSR-001'
| where sensor_name == 'Beam Alignment'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value
| render timechart

tiles.title: Nozzle Degradation Score
tiles.query:
Laser_NozzleDegScore
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, composite_score
| render timechart

tiles.title: Arc Voltage
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('WLD-001','WLD-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Arc Voltage'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart

tiles.title: Shielding Gas Flow
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id in ('WLD-001','WLD-002')
| where sensor_name == 'Shielding Gas Flow'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, machine_id
| render timechart

tiles.title: Gas Contamination Score
tiles.query:
Weld_GasContamScore
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, composite_score, machine_id
| render timechart

tiles.title: Enclosure Temperature (target: 20.0 +/- 0.5 C)
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'CMM-001'
| where sensor_name == 'Enclosure Temperature'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value
| render timechart

tiles.title: Measurement Accuracy Delta
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'CMM-001'
| where sensor_name == 'Measurement Accuracy Delta'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value
| render timechart

tiles.title: Environmental Drift Score
tiles.query:
CMM_EnvDriftScore
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, composite_score
| render timechart

tiles.title: Reflow Profile - All Zones
tiles.query:
MachineTelemetry
| where machine_id == 'RFL-001'
| where sensor_name has 'Zone'
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, value, sensor_name
| render timechart
tiles.notes: IPC-7530 compliant profile: Preheat 140-160, Soak 160-190, Reflow 230-250, Cool 25-60

tiles.title: Profile Drift Score
tiles.query:
Reflow_ProfileScore
| where timestamp > ago(30m)
| project timestamp, composite_score
| render timechart

theme.notes: Dark theme matching Fabric Real-Time Dashboard. Machine tiles switch from teal (#0078D4) to red (#E81123) when composite score exceeds threshold. Threshold lines are always visible as dashed reference lines.

setup_instructions: 1. Open CAEManufacturingEH Eventhouse in the workspace
2. Run the table creation and materialized view commands from data/kql/machine_health_monitoring.kql
3. Create a Real-Time Dashboard in the workspace
4. Add a data source pointing to the KQL Database in CAEManufacturingEH
5. Create tiles using the queries from this spec
6. Apply the theme colors and conditional formatting as described
8. The Activator should monitor the MachineHealthAlerts() function and trigger when any alert appears
